seoTitle: Auto-Scrolling Carousel in Squarespace: How-To Guide
metaDescription: Add an auto-scrolling carousel to your Squarespace site using a code snippet to showcase products, portfolios, or testimonials dynamically.
intro: An auto-scrolling carousel is a great way to showcase multiple images, products, or testimonials without taking up extra space on the page. This tutorial walks through implementing one in Squarespace using a shared code snippet, then customizing it to fit your brand and content.

steps.heading: Get the carousel code
steps.body: Find the code snippet referenced in the video, available in the pinned comment, before starting the implementation process.

steps.heading: Add the carousel to your site
steps.body: Follow the step-by-step tutorial to integrate the auto-scrolling carousel code into your Squarespace layout.

steps.heading: Customize the carousel's style
steps.body: Adjust the carousel to match your brand's colors, spacing, and content type, whether it's product images, portfolio pieces, or testimonials.

steps.heading: Optimize for engagement
steps.body: Use the carousel to highlight your best-selling items, top posts, or standout portfolio work in a way that keeps visitors scrolling.

steps.heading: Troubleshoot common issues
steps.body: If the carousel doesn't display correctly, revisit the code placement and integration steps covered in the tutorial.

faq.question: Where can I find the code for the carousel?
faq.answer: It's shared in the pinned comment on the tutorial video.

faq.question: Do I need coding experience to add this?
faq.answer: The tutorial is designed so that even those without coding experience can feel confident adding this feature by following along step by step.

faq.question: What kinds of businesses benefit from an auto-scrolling carousel?
faq.answer: E-commerce stores, photographers, and bloggers are highlighted as examples that can use a carousel to showcase best-sellers, portfolio work, or top posts.

faq.question: Can I customize the carousel to match my brand?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial covers tips on customizing the carousel to fit your brand style.

faq.question: What if the carousel isn't working after I add it?
faq.answer: The tutorial includes troubleshooting tips for common issues related to carousels in Squarespace.
